purpose: Machine-readable WellFit PR Review Agent governance for Codex Code Reviews and future WellFit agents. It defines the mandatory report-only review inputs, checklist, protected-area checks, cross-reference checks, readiness checks, repository inventory checks, auto-merge/auto-repair reporting, PR description fields, and human-review stops that every PR must be checked against before merge consideration. This policy never approves, merges, repairs, deploys, or authorizes protected runtime work.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Changed files are listed
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: PR description or review report includes all changed files or a summarized file list with paths.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Risk level is stated
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: Risk level is declared using project-register/risk-classifier.json.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Definition-of-done key is stated
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: Definition-of-done key is declared using project-register/definition-of-done.json.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Checks run are listed
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: Commands and pass/fail/warning results are included; failed checks are not hidden.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Protected files are untouched or explicitly reviewed
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: Protected paths/topics are reported untouched, or explicitly marked for human review when touched.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Work Map / TODO Index are updated when relevant
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: todolist/WORK_MAP.md and todolist/TODO_INDEX.md are updated or a no-update rationale is stated.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: product-readiness is updated when relevant
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: project-register/product-readiness.json and docs/architecture/WELLFIT_PRODUCT_READINESS_MATRIX.md are updated or a no-update rationale is stated.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Repository inventory is considered when relevant
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: project-register/repository-inventory.json and repository inventory output are considered for broad repo, mapping, route/API, or file coverage changes.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Cross-reference maintenance was applied
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: project-register/cross-reference-maintenance.json categories were considered and the validator result or rationale is reported.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: No duplicate architecture or parallel system was created
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: Review confirms existing Work Map and architecture/register files were extended instead of creating duplicate systems.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Auto-merge eligibility result is reported
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: Report-only AUTO_MERGE_ELIGIBLE=true/false result is included; it is not treated as merge approval.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Auto-repair decision result is reported
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: Report-only AUTO_REPAIR_ALLOWED=true/false result is included; it is not treated as repair approval.

requiredReviewChecklist.label: Next recommended task is stated
requiredReviewChecklist.requiredEvidence: PR description or review report includes a scoped next recommended task or states none.

protectedAreaChecks.requiredReviewAction: Confirm untouched and not merged, closed, depended on, or used as a shortcut.
Confirm untouched unless explicit repository-owner approval exists.
Treat as runtime product surface; require explicit review and relevant Next.js guidance before API/routing/rendering changes.
Treat as runtime UI surface; require scoped review and visual/screenshot consideration when perceptible.
Treat as runtime/shared logic; require risk review and protected-topic scan.
Treat as backend authority surface; require Firebase Functions check and human review for authority-adjacent logic.
Treat as security and economy guardrail surface; require explicit Firestore rules review.
Forbidden for auto-approval; require explicit human approval and compliance review.
Confirm no client-side final authorization; require human review for authority changes.
Confirm final authority remains server-side or explicitly draft/preview; require human review for authority changes.
Forbidden for auto-approval; require human review and clear compliance plan.

crossReferenceChecks.reviewRequirement: Map each PR to the relevant cross-reference change categories, update only existing leading files when relevant, and report the check result or no-update rationale.

readinessChecks.reviewRequirement: If a PR changes module status, blockers, safe next tasks, beta/production readiness, or protected module scope, update/read product readiness and report the result.

inventoryChecks.reviewRequirement: For broad repo changes, route/API mapping, new files, or governance/script/docs inventory changes, consider repository inventory and report whether an inventory update is needed.

autoMergeChecks.reviewRequirement: Report the eligibility result as information only; it cannot approve, merge, deploy, or bypass human review.

autoRepairChecks.reviewRequirement: Report the repair decision as information only; it cannot change files, approve, merge, deploy, or run repair loops.
